metadata.description: Generic AC servo motors with harmonic and cycloidal reducers
metadata.notes: IMPORTANT: mass_kg values are typical estimates. Larger motors and reducers are generic benchmark entries for sizing studies and must be verified against production candidates before release.

mass_estimates.gearboxes: Approximate masses by size: HD14~0.25kg, HD17~0.35kg, HD20~0.5kg, HD25~0.7kg, HD32~1.2kg, HD40~2kg, HD50~3.5kg, HD58~5kg, HD65~6.5kg, HD80~11kg, HD100~18kg, HD120~28kg

sources: Representative harmonic reducer ratios and torque classes
Representative servo motor torque and speed classes
High-torque and 180:1-200:1 entries added as generic palletizer-class sizing references
Mass values are engineering estimates and should be verified
Generic E-series cycloidal reducers (standard spec tables)
Generic C-series high-precision cycloidal reducers (standard spec tables)
Rated/intermittent torques, ratios, backlash, efficiency from representative spec tables
Inertia values are representative per model; actual inertia varies by ratio

gearbox_types.harmonic: Single-stage strain wave gear, zero backlash
